hero.title: Creators and brands, matched by voice.
hero.subtitle: Jick interviews creators and Jall briefs brands, then we match the two — no cold outreach, no guesswork.

waitlistForm.title: Be first in line
waitlistForm.consent: I agree to be contacted about early access.
waitlistForm.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch soon.

hero.badge: Trusted matchmaking for the creator economy
hero.note: No cold outreach. No spreadsheets. No guesswork.
hero.trustedBy: Built for teams across the creator economy

sides.title: Two agents. One introduction.
sides.subtitle: Jick works for creators. Jall works for brands. They meet in the middle — but only when both sides say yes.

creator.title: Get discovered without the DMs
creator.body: Jick voice-interviews you once and builds a living profile of your voice, niche, audience and rates. Then it brings you paid work that actually fits.
points: One quick voice chat — no forms, no media kit
Your rates and boundaries, respected up front
Only see briefs you'd actually say yes to

brand.title: Turn a rough idea into the right creators
brand.body: Jall turns your campaign into a structured brief with real evaluation criteria, then hands you a ranked shortlist of creators who fit — not a catalog to scroll.
points: Describe the campaign out loud; get a sharp brief back
Ranked matches on fit, audience and rate
Pay the creator amount plus a flat 10% — that's it

how.title: How the match happens
how.subtitle: Four steps from hello to a signed collaboration.

steps.title: Say hello, out loud
steps.body: Creators talk to Jick, brands talk to Jall. A short voice conversation replaces the endless forms.

steps.title: We build the profile
steps.body: Your words become a structured profile or brief — voice, niche, audience, rates, and evaluation criteria.

steps.title: The engine ranks fit
steps.body: A continuous retrieval-and-ranking pipeline scores every creator against every brief and learns from feedback.

steps.title: Consent, then connect
steps.body: Nothing happens behind your back. Introductions only go out when both sides opt in.

marketing.audiencesTitle: Built for teams across the creator economy

trust.title: Enterprise-grade by default
trust.subtitle: The controls brands need and the protections creators deserve — built into the platform, not bolted on.

pillars.title: Consent-gated introductions
pillars.body: No creator or brand is ever contacted without opting in. Every match is a mutual yes.

pillars.title: Private by design
pillars.body: Voice recordings stay private and auto-expire after 90 days, with deletion that propagates upstream.

pillars.title: Deterministic pricing
pillars.body: Brands pay the creator amount plus a flat 10%. Every figure reconciles to the penny.

pillars.title: Bilingual & accessible
pillars.body: Fully equivalent in English and Spanish, built to WCAG 2.1 AA with reduced-motion support.

cta.title: Stop guessing. Start matching.
cta.body: Join the waitlist and be first through the door when Jick & Jall opens.
cta.creator: Join as a creator

items.q: Do I need a big following?
items.a: No. Jick is built for everyone from micro-UGC creators to macro influencers. Fit beats follower count.

items.q: How much does it cost creators?
items.a: Nothing to join. Brands pay the agreed creator amount plus a flat 10% platform fee — creators keep their rate.

items.q: Is this just another influencer catalog?
items.a: No. There's no browse-10,000-influencers interface. Brands get a ranked shortlist matched to a real brief.

items.q: What happens to my voice recording?
items.a: Recordings are private by default and kept for 90 days. Delete anytime and it propagates upstream.

items.q: Do both sides have to agree?
items.a: Always. Introductions are consent-gated — a match only becomes a conversation when creator and brand both opt in.
